practicalExamples.description: Use AI to categorize incoming Slack messages and assign them to the correct team member based on content and urgency. Store conversation history and user preferences to improve routing accuracy over time.
Automate follow-up emails to leads based on their interaction history. Use memory to recall past communications, preferred contact methods, and deal stage to personalize each message.

Route customer support tickets to the appropriate department using AI analysis of ticket content. Maintain a memory of common issues and resolutions to suggest automated responses and escalate complex cases.

implementationSteps: Identify a high-volume, repetitive task that involves decision-making based on historical data
Map out the current manual process including all decision points and data sources
Design a memory system to capture and structure relevant historical context
Implement AI agents with access to both real-time data and stored memory
Add approval steps for critical decisions and logging for audit purposes
Test with real data and refine based on performance metrics
Monitor for edge cases and implement fallback procedures
commonMistakes: Relying solely on chat history instead of structured memory
Ignoring the need for human oversight in critical decisions
Failing to plan for data privacy and security requirements
Not accounting for workflow exceptions and failure scenarios
Overlooking integration with existing business systems
toolsToConsider: OpenAI GPT models for natural language processing
Microsoft Azure AI Services for enterprise-grade AI capabilities
Custom database solutions for structured memory storage
Monitoring and alerting tools for workflow performance tracking
